content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 SimpleTiger LLC: B2B SaaS PPC Specialist Anywhere in the World 🇺🇸 United States of America Florida PPC, PPC Management, and PPC Campaigns Sales and Marketing Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0001/4550/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Sarasota, FL <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.simpletiger.com/">https://www.simpletiger.com/</a> </p> <p>We're a B2B SaaS-focused marketing agency looking for a skilled, self-driven PPC Specialist, with 3+ years of experience, to support our paid media team on a contract basis. This is a part-time, flexible engagement of 20 hours per week.&nbsp;</p> <p>You'll build, launch, manage, and optimize paid ad campaigns across Google Ads, Meta (Facebook and Instagram), and LinkedIn. Your work will directly shape the return on ad spend for the SaaS accounts you support, and you'll partner with our marketing, content, and SEO teams to keep campaigns sharp. Since this is a focused part-time role, we'll prioritize the work that moves the needle most on each account.</p> <h3>Key Responsibilities</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Build and launch ad campaigns from the ground up, including keyword research, ad group structure, bid setup, and ad creative.</p> </li> <li> <p>Manage and optimize active campaigns to hit key metrics like CTR, CPC, CPA, and ROI.</p> </li> <li> <p>Run A/B tests to find the ad creatives, landing pages, and targeting that perform best.</p> </li> <li> <p>Work with our content and design teams to shape ad creative that connects with the right audience and drives conversions.</p> </li> <li> <p>Partner with our SEO team to share recommendations on landing page and campaign performance.</p> </li> <li> <p>Track campaign results and report on them clearly, with practical next steps for improvement.</p> </li> <li> <p>Manage ad budgets so spend stays efficient and tied to each account's goals.</p> </li> <li> <p>Keep up with platform updates, new features, and best practices.</p> </li> <li> <p>Communicate quickly and proactively with our team about the accounts you support.</p> </li> </ul> <h3><strong>What We’re Looking For:&nbsp;</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Strong hands-on experience managing PPC campaigns across Google Ads and other paid media platforms.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to develop campaign strategy, build the structure, and execute optimizations independently.</p> </li> <li> <p>Proficiency in keyword research, search intent analysis, and audience targeting.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with conversion tracking, pixel setup, and troubleshooting attribution issues.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance data and make data-driven decisions.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience writing, testing, and optimizing ad copy and creatives.</p> </li> <li> <p>Knowledge of bid management, budget pacing, and campaign forecasting.</p> </li> <li> <p>Ability to run A/B tests and apply results to improve performance.</p> </li> <li> <p>Understanding of landing page optimization and conversion rate best practices.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong reporting skills, including the ability to summarize results, insights, and next steps clearly.</p> </li> <li> <p>Excellent attention to detail, organization, and time management.</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate with internal teams or stakeholders when needed.</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>Nice to have:</strong></h3> <ul> <li> <p>Experience with Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Microsoft Ads, YouTube, or other paid channels.</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with GA4, Google Tag Manager, Looker Studio, or similar analytics tools.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience working with CRM systems and lead handoff workflows.</p> </li> <li> <p>Basic knowledge of SEO and broader digital marketing strategy.</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with automation, scripting, or AI-assisted optimization.</p> </li> <li> <p>Prior agency or multi-account management experience.</p> </li> <li> <p>Google Ads or related platform certifications.</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/simpletiger-llc-b2b-saas-ppc-specialist">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/simpletiger-llc-b2b-saas-ppc-specialist</a></p> Thu, 09 Jul 2026 20:57:50 Wonderdog: Full-Stack Product Engineer - Agentic First Anywhere in the World 🇨🇦 Canada and 🇺🇸 United States of America Alabama Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5766/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://wonderdoghealth.com/">https://wonderdoghealth.com/</a> </p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Wonder Dog is a preventative health platform for dogs. We send licensed vet techs to your home for a blood draw, run a 40+ biomarker panel through a national lab, and turn the results into something owners can actually act on. We're a small team with paying customers, and you'd be working directly with the founder and our lead engineer.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>How we work</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">AI coding agents do most of the typing here. Your job is to direct them, review the output, and make sure what ships is right. You pick up a ticket, ship it, verify it, and move on. Few meetings, no ceremony.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>What you'll do</strong></p> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ship customer-facing features end to end: UI, API, database</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Work a prioritized backlog across checkout, booking, onboarding, and mobile</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Own quality. If it's not tested and working, it's not done</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Tell us when we're wrong. We'd rather hear it early</li> </ul> <p
